seed_instruction: Critically evaluate the hotel you stayed in during your last vacation.
org_constraint: Include at least one rhetorical question to engage the audience.
new_constraint: Use declarative statements only—no questions allowed.
instruction: Critically evaluate the hotel you stayed in during your last vacation. Include at least one rhetorical question to engage the audience. Use declarative statements only—no questions allowed.
response:
The Grandview Resort offered a striking balance between modern luxury and rustic charm. The lobby featured towering marble pillars and a crystal chandelier that illuminated the space with a warm glow. Every guest room provided a panoramic view of the coastline. The staff maintained a high level of professionalism throughout the stay. 

The breakfast buffet included a diverse selection of local delicacies and fresh pastries. One could hardly imagine a more serene morning experience. The pool area remained pristine despite the high volume of visitors. The only notable flaw involved the slow elevator speed during peak hours. The overall atmosphere provided a sense of tranquility and comfort. This establishment remains a premier choice for travelers seeking a peaceful retreat.<turn|>
